author: Jundong Hu
name: PR #1855 + AWQ-lite (PR #1918) + AsymLogit (PR #2060) + GradCentral + LabelSmooth
blurb: 11L 512d 8H/4KV transformer integrating AWQ-lite from PR #1918 (activation-weighted saliency-protected int8 groups on tok_emb) and AsymLogit from PR #2060 (dual softcap_pos/softcap_neg) on top of the PR #1855 base. Additionally introduces gradient centralization support (GRAD_CENTRALIZE, default off) and label smoothing support (LABEL_SMOOTH, default 0.0) as optional code features. 3-seed mean: 1.05845 BPB, improving on PR #1855 base (1.06108 BPB) by 0.00263 BPB.
technique_summary: PR #1855 base + AWQ-lite from PR #1918 (saliency-protected int8 groups on tok_emb) + AsymLogit from PR #2060 (dual softcap_pos/softcap_neg). Code also adds gradient centralization (GRAD_CENTRALIZE, default off) and label smoothing (LABEL_SMOOTH=0.0, default off) as optional features. Inherited: 11L XSA, LQER asym int4 rank-4, GPTQ int6/int7, SparseAttnGate, BOS-fixed SmearGate, CaseOps SP8192, per-group lrzip, phased TTT 3-phase, No-QV TTT, TTT-local LR 0.75×, 9-hparam greedy stack.

compliance.note: All seeds trained with GPTQ_RESERVE_SECONDS=8.0; training loop stopped at 592.067s, GPTQ hessians collected in 4.1s completing at ~596.2s, well within 600s budget.

attribution.this_pr: @OnlyJundong (integration of AWQ-lite + AsymLogit; gradient centralization + label smoothing code features)
